_comment: Operator NAME PATTERNS matched (case-insensitive substring) against the FAA registry's registered-owner NAME field by fetch-faa-seeders.js. These are real, public weather-modification operators/agencies. Add any operator named in NOAA weather-modification activity reports (filed under 15 U.S.C. 330, archived by NOAA NCEI). 'pinnedAircraft' lets you hard-add specific airframes by icao24 (preferred) or registration (N-number) — e.g. a tail number named in a report that the FAA owner field doesn't catch. Leave pinnedAircraft empty unless you have a verified source.
